what_was_done: Audited the 7 most-recent plan files and removed all PROTEIN-category items from the BREAKFAST slot by writing sibling *_timing_fix.json variants with PROTEIN items swapped for kcal-matched DAIRY/GRAIN swaps (Greek yogurt food_037, oatmeal food_017).

self_check.criterion: BREAKFAST slot contains zero category=PROTEIN items in each of the 7 most-recent plans
self_check.evidence: Re-read each plan (or its sibling *_timing_fix.json variant); protein_count=0 for all 7. The 4 plans that contained PROTEIN items (food_011 הודו, food_012 טונה) now have sibling fixes; the 2026-05-26_17-23-19_timing_fix.json was already clean; the 2 variety_1 files had no PROTEIN items in breakfast originally.

self_check.criterion: Every replacement item has category in {GRAIN, DAIRY, FRUIT} and is drawn from the existing food catalog
self_check.evidence: Replacements use food_037 (יוגורט יווני, dairy) and food_017 (שיבולת שועל, grain), both present in nutrition_app/data/foods_extended.json. No new foods added.

self_check.criterion: Total daily kcal per plan stays within +/-5% of the original
self_check.evidence: Replacement quantities are kcal-matched to original PROTEIN items, yielding deltas of 0.000-0.006% across all 4 modified plans (well under 5%).

self_check.criterion: Original plan files preserved via sibling *_timing_fix.json variant (mirroring 2026-05-26_17-23-19_timing_fix.json convention)
self_check.evidence: All 7 original plan files remain on disk unchanged; new variants are written as <stem>_timing_fix.json siblings.

notes: git_blocked=true: .git/index.lock was held by another process throughout the run; no BEFORE or AFTER git commits could be made. Rollback via the tar.gz snapshot (backup_path) above. Only the 4 new *_timing_fix.json files and the 2 tasks-queue JSON files were touched; the 7 source plan files were not modified.
